text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Urgh... This isn't right, and neither is this!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Oh, hi Trainer! I'm trying to make an original spice
blend!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
It's still missing a little something, but I just can't
tell what! I've been trying to figure it out for ages!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Guh! What can it be? What's the missing spice?! I
won't be able to rest until I find the answer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Akebono is so fixated on perfecting her
spice blend that she doesn't seem capable of
concentrating on anything else...
